subcodes.title: Words to Mirza Youness Khan around 1904
subcodes.first_line: Well there is a wisdom and I must be sometimes suffering... It is a mistake to think that the Glorious Cause may be better spread in peace and tranquility. There must always be change of position, movements, revolutions and calamities
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @growth of the Cause, @universal peace; world unity, @suffering and imprisonment, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
